    Request 
    <SeatAvailabilityRQmsg>
  <SeatAvailabilityRQ>
    <AgencyCode>60200040
    </AgencyCode>
    <LanguageCode>en-US
    </LanguageCode>
    <ActionType>SEG
    </ActionType>

        </FlightSegmentGroupId>

      <MaximumInfantsPerUnit>1
      </MaximumInfantsPerUnit>
    </SeatMapInformation>
  </SeatAvailabilityRS>
</SeatAvailabilityRSmsg>

    Method: BundleAvailability

    Overview

    This service returns the Bundle services availability for sale.

    Service URL

    
https://<ServerURL:port>/twayair/service/shop/BundleAvailability

    Predecessor Method

    AirAvailability

    AncillaryAvailability

    Successor Method

    CreateBooking

    Description

    This service returns the Bundle services availability for sale.

    If you request after reservation, you should input PnrNumber and ItineraryInfo > FlightSegmentInfo > SegmentId in RQ.

    Depending on ActionType, it is possible to query by PNR or by SEG. However, if there is a PNR by CreateBooking, it is more accurate to look it up with PNR.

    ● AncillarySaleDelegate Agency

    If the Agency authorized to AncillarySaleDelegate services, You have to include the AncillaryAuthToken, along with the AgencyCode, PnrNumber, and GuestDetailsForAuth that were used at the time of token issuance when calling the APIs below when searching by PNR.

    Please refer to the About The Role page for more information on authorization.

    ● Group PNR Retrieval Agency

    If the Agency authorized to retrieve Group PNR, You have to include GuestDetailsForAuth in the Request.

    Please refer to the About The Role page for more information on authorization.

    Input

    The input of this method is the argument BundleAvailabilityRQmsg > BundleAvailabilityRQ having the structure defined by the following table.

    NameTypeRequired?OccursDescription
    AgencyCodestringYes1Unique Identifier for the Travel. Max Length: 9
    LanguageCodestringYes1Preferred language code Max Length: 5 ko-KR : Korean ja-JP : Japanese en-US : English th -TH: Thai vi-VN : Vietnamese zh-CN: Chinese zh-TW : SimplifiedChinese ru-RU : Russian
    SegmentIdstringYes1.. 2Unique identifier for a flight leg in the PNR or segmentInfo of ItineraryInfoForAncillary. The value of which is obtained in the response of the retrieve Reservation flow. This Id is required for Allocate Seats to identify the segment for allocating the seats. Max Length: 25 (PNR) – FlightSegmentDetail’s segmentId (SEG) – FlightSegmentInfoForAncillary’s segmentId In case of Bundle, it can be viewed in several ways.
    PnrNumberstringNo0..1Unique identifier for a booking record. Max Length: 15
    ItineraryInfoForAncillaryItineraryInfoTypeForAcnillaryNo0.. 1Indicates flight segment info for segmentGroupId and segmentId You must enter information for the entire journey. For example, if you want to check only departure flights on a round trip, enter a round trip.
    ActionTypestringNo0.. 1Indicates Search Action Type SEG or PNR If the value is empty, search by PNR
    AncillaryAuthTokenstringNo0.1If this Agency is authorized to AncillarySaleDelegate Agency, the input is mandatory when search by PNR.
    GuestDetailsForAuthGuestDetailsForAuthTypeNo0.*If this Agency is authorized to AncillarySaleDelegate or GroupPnrRetrieveAvailAgency, the input is mandatory when search by PNR. TicketNumber, GivenName, and SurName are mandatory fields in GuestDetailsForAuth.

    Output

    The output of this method is the argument BundleAvailabilityRSmsg > BundleAvailabilityRS having the structure defined by the following table.

    NameTypeRequired?OccursDescription
    BundleServiceListForSegGrpBundleServiceListForSegGrpNo0..*Indicates available BundleServiceList for FlightSegmentGroupId.
    ErrorTypeErrorTypeNo0..1Contains Any Error Messages generated while processing request. Populated only if there are any errors while processing the request

    RQ/RS Samples

    CaseDescription
    CASE1Search by SegmentInfo
    CASE2Search by PNR
    CASE3Agency authorized to Ancillary Delegate Sale
    CASE4Agency authorized to retrieve Group PNR.

    Exceptions

    Error CodeMessage
    BKG_SFE_001Invalid SSR keyword.
    WS_001Mandatory data missing AirlineCode
    WS_101Mandatory Data Missing.AirlineCode.
    WS_1111The requested service is currently blocked by the Administrator.Please try again later or contact the Administrator
    WS_122Mandatory Data Missing.Booking Channel.
    WS_149Mandatory Data Missing.ChannelType.
    WS_150Mandatory Data Missing.Channel.
    WS_151Mandatory Data Missing.Locale.
    WS_253Mandatory Data Missing.SSR Code
    WS_751User not defined in the system.

    Sample Request/Response (with SegmentInfo)

    Request 
    <BundleAvailabilityRQmsg>
  <BundleAvailabilityRQ>
    <AgencyCode>60200040
    </AgencyCode>
    <LanguageCode>en-US
    </LanguageCode>
    <ActionType>SEG
    </ActionType>
    <ItineraryInfoForAncillary>
      <FlightSegmentInfoForAncillary>
        <FlightSegmentGroupId>1
        </FlightSegmentGroupId>
        <SegmentId>1
        </SegmentId>
        <DepAirport>GMP
        </DepAirport>
        <ArrAirport>CJU
        </ArrAirport>
        <FareClass>B
        </FareClass>
        <FlightDate>2021-04-05
        </FlightDate>
        <FltNumber>707
        </FltNumber>
      </FlightSegmentInfoForAncillary>
    </ItineraryInfoForAncillary>
    <SegmentId>1
    </SegmentId>
  </BundleAvailabilityRQ>
</BundleAvailabilityRQmsg>
    Response 
    <BundleAvailabilityRSmsg TokenId = "TKN-dev-remake.twayair.com-ajp-nio-8015-exec-14-1615434628172--1146615874">
  <BundleAvailabilityRS>
    <BundleServiceListForSegGrp>
      <FlightSegmentGroupId>1
      </FlightSegmentGroupId>
      <BundleServiceListForSeg>
        <SegmentId>1
        </SegmentId>
        <BundleService>
          <BundleCode>BUND1
          </BundleCode>
          <BundleDiv>BS
          </BundleDiv>
          <BundleDivExplain>basic bundle
          </BundleDivExplain>
          <BundleAmount>0.0
          </BundleAmount>
          <DcPer>0.0
          </DcPer>
          <FreeBagWeight>15.0
          </FreeBagWeight>
          <FreeBagPiece>1
          </FreeBagPiece>
          <BundleChild>
            <IsAvailableService>true
            </IsAvailableService>
            <BundleChildCode>BFBA
            </BundleChildCode>
            <BundleChildName>checked baggage
            </BundleChildName>
            <IsFreeSvc>false
            </IsFreeSvc>
            <IsPnrAdd>false

    Method: RetrievePaxTypeDiscount

    Overview

    This service will retrieve information on individual discounts for domestic flights.

    Service URL

    
https://<ServerURL:port>/twayair/service/shop/ RetrievePaxTypeDiscount

    Predecessor Method

    AirAvailability

    Successor Method

    FareQuote

    Description

    This service will retrieve information on individual discounts for domestic flights.

    This returns the name of the passenger discount type that matches the requested language.

    Input

    The input of this method is the argument RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQmsg> RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQ having the structure defined by the following table.

    NameTypeRequired?OccursDescription
    AgencyCodestringYes1Unique Identifier for the Travel. Max Length: 9
    PaxTypeInfoPaxTypeInfoYes1..*Contains details about the types of passengers.
    FlightDatestringYes1The departure date of the flight in its first segment. YYYY-MM-DD
    LanguageCodestringYes1Preferred language code Max Length: 5 ko-KR : Korean ja-JP : Japanese en-US : English th -TH: Thai vi-VN : Vietnamese zh-CN: Chinese zh-TW : SimplifiedChinese ru-RU : Russian

    Output

    The output of this method is the argument RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRSmsg > RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRS having the structure defined by the following table.

    NameTypeRequired?OccursDescription
    PaxTypeDiscountInfoPaxTypeDiscountInfoYes1..*Passenger type discount information.
    ErrorTypeErrorTypeNo0..1Contains Any Error Messages generated while processing request. Populated only if there are any errors while processing the request

    RQ/RS Samples

    CaseDescription
    CASE1ADULT
    CASE2ADULT,CHILD

    Exceptions

    Error CodeMessage
    ERR_COD_006PaxType is mandatory
    ERR_COD_009AgencyCode is mandatory
    ERR_COD_044Invalid Date format. Expected Date format is yyyy-MM-dd
    ERR_COD_050Invalid Request Format
    ERR_COD_143LanguageCode is mandatory
    ERR_COD_217Invalid FlightDate
    ERR_COD_230Invalid LanguageCode
    ERR_COD_365DepartureFlightDate is mandatory
    ERR_COD_366Expected PaxType is ADULT│CHILD
    ERR_COD_367PaxType is duplicate

    Sample Request/Response (ADULT)

    Request 
    <RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQmsg>
  <RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQ>
    <AgencyCode>60200040
    </AgencyCode>
    <PaxTypeInfo>
      <PaxType>ADULT
      </PaxType>
    </PaxTypeInfo>
    <DepartureFlightDate>2023-07-30
    </DepartureFlightDate>
    <LanguageCode>ko-KR
    </LanguageCode>
  </RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQ>
</RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRQmsg>
    Response 
    <RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRSmsg TokenID="TKN-dev-DESKTOP-Q1PIE9D-http-nio-8080-exec-2-1688355982291--1866579188">
  <RetrievePaxTypeDiscountRS>
    <PaxTypeDiscountInfo>
      <PaxType>ADULT
      </PaxType>
      <PaxSubTypeInfo>
        <PaxSubType>CD
        </PaxSubType>
        <Explain>경로우대
        </Explain>
        <RouteType>D
        </RouteType>
        <DiscountFareTypeInfo>
          <FareType>NormalFare
          </FareType>

            <DiscountType>FARE

        <PaxSubType>HDA

        <Explain>장애의 정도가 심한 장애인(중증, 기존1~3급)의 동반보호자 1명
        </Explain>
        <RouteType>D
        </RouteType>

          <FareType>BizFare

      <PaxSubTypeInfo>
